---
title: "Psychology Student"
image: mypic.png
image-shape: round
image-width: 15em
links:
  - text: Email
    href: mailto:rezahakimazar@studium.uni-hamburg.de
    icon: envelope
  - text: GitHub
    href: https://github.com
    icon: github
---



This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
